summary: Pre-production verification for Project Centurion iteration 10. All 27 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend tests confirm auth modal, pricing page, privacy page, cookie consent, and dashboard protection. Fixed waitlist endpoint issue (referral_count column missing in Supabase).

minor.issue: referral_count column missing in Supabase waitlist table - fixed by removing from insert

issues: Recharts warning: 'width(-1) and height(-1) should be greater than 0' - cosmetic issue during initial mount

backend_api: Health endpoint /api/health returns 200 with status 'ok' and supabase 'connected'
Waitlist blocks submission without DPDP consent (422)
Stage benchmarks (pre-seed, seed, series-a) return correct data
Benchmark comparison returns percentile and status
Quiz submission returns projection and benchmark
Connectors providers list returns Razorpay and Stripe
frontend: TC-01: Auth modal opens with consent checkbox, email input, Google OAuth
TC-03: Google OAuth button present ('Continue with Google')
TC-09: Stage selector found on benchmarks page
TC-10: Result gate shows for anonymous users on milestone cards
TC-16: Pricing page shows Free (₹0), Starter (₹499/mo), Founder (₹3,999/yr)
TC-18: Checkout page shows correct plan based on URL param
Privacy page loads at /privacy with DPDP Act compliance
Cookie consent banner appears on first visit with Accept/Decline buttons
Sentry initialization shows warning (DSN not configured - expected)
configuration: FRONTEND_URL configured for correct share URLs
Scheduler running with 4 habit engine jobs

action_items: Run Supabase migration to add referral_count column to waitlist table for referral position boosting feature
Configure SENTRY_DSN in backend/.env and REACT_APP_SENTRY_DSN in frontend/.env for production error tracking
critical_code_review_comments: Waitlist endpoint now handles missing referral_count column gracefully
Sentry integration properly shows warning when DSN not configured (doesn't break app)
Cookie consent banner correctly stores preference in localStorage
Privacy page covers all 6 DPDP Act required disclosures
Auth modal includes consent checkbox linked to Privacy Policy
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-production verification complete. All critical flows working: auth modal with consent, calculator engine, pricing page, checkout page, privacy page, cookie consent, dashboard protection, admin endpoint protection. Waitlist endpoint fixed (removed referral_count from insert). Sentry DSN not configured (expected - shows warning only). ADMIN_EMAILS configured. Razorpay payment tests skipped as keys not configured.

mocked_api.note: All APIs are live with Supabase. Sentry DSN not configured (will show warning only).

test_coverage_summary.TC-10: PASS - Result gate shows for anonymous users on milestone cards
test_coverage_summary.TC-14: PASS - Free users redirected (dashboard requires paid/beta)
test_coverage_summary.TC-16: PASS - Pricing page shows Free (₹0), Starter (₹499/mo), Founder (₹3,999/yr)
test_coverage_summary.TC-18: PASS - Checkout page shows correct plan based on URL param
test_coverage_summary.TC-20: PASS - Admin trigger digest job requires auth (403)
test_coverage_summary.TC-22: PASS - Admin dedup status requires auth (403)
